---
title: "Data Science"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(results = 'asis', echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, glue)
```

![](https://secure.meetupstatic.com/photos/event/d/7/4/b/600_482695115.jpeg)

#### Interdisciplinary field that uses scientific methods, processes, algorithms, and systems to extract knowledge and insights from many structural and unstructured data. 

--- Related to [Data Analytics](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Data_analysis), [Data Mining](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Data_mining), [Big Data](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Big_data), [Regression](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Regression_analysis), [Deep Learning](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Deep_learning), [Machine Learning](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Machine_learning), and [Business Intelligence](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Business_intelligence).
